fields.name: folder
fields.label: Fixture folder (must match folder name in content/fixtures, e.g. 2026-27)

fields.name: archived
fields.label: Archived (hides this season from the public website)

fields.name: map_link
fields.label: Maps link (paste a Google Maps URL for the venue)

fields.name: current_season
fields.label: Current season (e.g. 2025/26) — fixtures page defaults to this

fields.name: announcement_link
fields.label: Announcement link (optional — makes the banner clickable)

fields.name: stats
fields.label: Home page stats (5+ Teams, 60+ Members etc.)

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
